footer.tagline: A web agency specialised in professional website creation and Google search engine optimisation.

meta.title: Agency — Web design & SEO agency: build a website that ranks on Google
meta.description: Web agency specialised in professional website creation and Google SEO. Showcase sites, e-commerce, redesigns and tailor-made search engine optimisation for ambitious brands.

hero.title: Websites that convert. SEO that ranks.
hero.subtitle: We design fast, elegant, SEO-ready websites. Every project is tailor-made to turn your visibility into customers.

services.title: A full-service web agency, from design to SEO
services.subtitle: Two complementary skill sets to build an online presence that works for you 24/7.
services.webDescription: WordPress showcase sites, Shopify stores and custom builds. Modern design, optimal performance, perfect accessibility.
services.seoDescription: Google SEO, Google Ads and social media. Every marketing action aligned with your acquisition strategy.

why.title: A web agency that measures impact, not output.
why.subtitle: We refuse approximation. Every design decision, every line of code and every keyword is chosen to serve your business goals.

items.title: Obsessive performance
items.body: Lighthouse score of 100, Core Web Vitals in the green, sub-second load times. Speed is both an SEO and a sales lever.

items.title: SEO baked into design
items.body: Semantic structure, Schema.org markup, internal linking, multilingual hreflang: SEO is built in, never bolted on.

items.title: Design that converts
items.body: Modern aesthetics aren't enough. Every section is engineered to guide visitors towards the action that matters to you.

items.title: Transparent partnership
items.body: A single point of contact, a clear timeline, monthly reporting. You always know where your project and your ROI stand.

process.title: A proven process, with no nasty surprises
process.subtitle: A four-step methodology to deliver a high-performing website and lasting SEO results.

steps.title: Strategic framing
steps.body: Discovery workshop, audit of the existing site, competitor research and target keyword definition. We lay solid foundations before the first mockup.

steps.title: Design & architecture
steps.body: UX/UI mockups, information architecture, SEO sitemap and collaborative validation through interactive prototypes.

steps.title: Development & technical SEO
steps.body: Modern Next.js development, pixel-perfect implementation, Schema.org markup, multilingual sitemap and optimised performance.

steps.title: Launch & growth
steps.body: Go-live, ranking monitoring, monthly SEO iterations, conversion rate optimisation and transparent reporting.

items.quote: Our organic traffic tripled in six months and we're finally ranking first on our strategic keywords. The team is responsive and skilled.
items.author: Sophie Laurent

items.quote: A modern, lightning-fast and perfectly optimised website. Agency met every commitment, on time and on budget.
items.author: Julien Morel

items.quote: Clear process, gorgeous design, killer SEO. Our qualified leads doubled in the first quarter.
items.author: Clara Benedetti

items.q: How much does a professional website cost?
items.a: A WordPress showcase site starts around €1,500, a Shopify e-commerce store from €3,000, and a custom-built site from €5,000. Every quote follows a free scoping call.

items.q: How long does it take to deliver a website?
items.a: A showcase site is delivered in 4 to 6 weeks, a more complex project in 8 to 12 weeks. We work in sprints with full visibility on every milestone.
Technical SEO is built into every website project. Editorial SEO and link building are offered as an optional monthly retainer.

items.q: Do you work with international clients?
items.a: Yes. We support clients across Europe, Spain and Canada. Multilingual mastery is at the heart of our projects.

items.q: Will I own the website after launch?
items.a: Absolutely. You own the source code and the content. We train your team and stay available for any future need.

cta.title: Ready to step it up?
cta.subtitle: Let's talk about your project. Free SEO audit, quote within 48 hours.

content.intro: Agency is a French web agency specialised in professional website creation and Google SEO. We design high-performing digital experiences for SMBs and scale-ups that want to turn their site into a true acquisition engine.
paragraphs: A modern website is no longer a static brochure. It is a business asset that has to attract, convince and convert. At Agency we craft websites that combine careful design, an SEO-friendly architecture and outstanding performance.
Google SEO sits at the heart of our approach. From the very first mockups, we work on semantic structure, Hn tags, Schema.org structured data, Core Web Vitals and content architecture.

Whether it is a WordPress showcase site, a Shopify e-commerce store, a custom-built platform, a Google Ads campaign or a social media strategy, our methodology stays the same: listen, measure, design, ship, iterate.

meta.title: Professional website creation — Agency web agency
meta.description: Tailor-made website creation: WordPress showcase sites, Shopify e-commerce stores, custom-built websites. Modern design, top performance and Google SEO baked in.

hero.title: Professional websites that actually convert.
hero.subtitle: A French web agency designing WordPress showcase sites, Shopify stores and custom-built applications. Premium design, integrated SEO, flawless performance.

serviceWeb.intro: Building a professional website is a strategic investment. It is not about merely existing online but about shaping a business asset that attracts qualified visitors, tells your story and turns prospects into loyal customers.

sections.title: WordPress, Shopify or custom: the right solution for every project
sections.body: We match the technology to your actual needs. WordPress for a showcase site that's quick to update, Shopify for a robust e-commerce store, or custom code for an unlimited platform. Each solution is deployed with the same standards of design, performance and SEO.

sections.title: UX/UI design engineered to convert
sections.body: Our designers create interfaces that guide visitors towards the action that matters: quote request, purchase, contact. Modern aesthetics aren't enough — every section is designed to reduce friction and maximise your conversion rate.

sections.title: Performance and Core Web Vitals at the core
sections.body: A slow site loses visitors and falls in Google rankings. We optimise Core Web Vitals (LCP, INP, CLS), images (AVIF, WebP), fonts and JavaScript. Our deliveries systematically target a perfect 100 Lighthouse score.

sections.title: Google SEO integrated from day one
sections.body: Hn hierarchy, Schema.org markup, multilingual sitemaps, semantic URLs and Open Graph tags are part of the development itself. Your site is indexed and optimised the moment it goes live.

deliverables.title: What your website project includes
items: Tailor-made UX/UI design and interactive prototypes
Core Web Vitals optimisation and Lighthouse 100

cta.title: Let's talk about your future website
cta.subtitle: Free audit, quote within 48 hours, no commitment.

meta.title: Professional WordPress showcase site — Agency web agency
meta.description: Custom WordPress showcase site creation. Professional design, optimal performance, integrated SEO. Free quote within 48h.

hero.title: A professional WordPress showcase site that attracts and converts.
hero.subtitle: We build elegant, fast and Google-optimised WordPress showcase sites. The ideal solution for SMBs that want to shine online.

serviceVitrine.intro: WordPress is the world's most-used platform for professional showcase sites. Flexible, robust and easy to manage, it enables elegant and high-performing sites without any technical skills. At Agency, we customise WordPress 100% — no generic themes, a design fully tailored to your brand.

sections.title: Custom WordPress, no generic themes
sections.body: Unlike many agencies that install a premium theme and change the colours, we develop child themes or headless WordPress sites that reflect your exact visual identity. The result: a unique, lightweight and perfectly maintainable site.

sections.title: Google SEO-ready from day one
sections.body: We configure Yoast SEO or Rank Math, structure permalinks, optimise title and meta tags, create the XML sitemap and implement Schema.org structured data. Your WordPress site is off to the right start on Google.

sections.title: Simple admin, total autonomy
sections.body: One of WordPress's great advantages: you can update your content yourself, without touching the code. We train you on the admin interface and configure custom Gutenberg blocks for a simple and enjoyable editing experience.

sections.title: Maximum performance and security
sections.body: A poorly configured WordPress is slow and vulnerable. We optimise performance (cache, CDN, lazy-load images), secure the installation and host on high-performance servers with HTTPS.

deliverables.title: What your WordPress showcase site includes
items: WordPress development with custom child theme
Core Web Vitals and loading speed optimisation
Contact form and Google Analytics integration
Maintenance and updates included for 3 months

cta.title: Your WordPress showcase site in 4 weeks
cta.subtitle: Free quote within 48h. No commitment.

meta.title: Shopify e-commerce store — Agency web agency
meta.description: Custom Shopify e-commerce store creation. Professional design, secure payments, integrated SEO. Grow your online sales.

hero.title: A Shopify store that sells, day and night.
hero.subtitle: We build elegant, fast and conversion-optimised Shopify e-commerce stores. The most robust solution for selling online effectively.

serviceEcommerce.intro: Shopify is the reference e-commerce platform for brands that want to sell online without technical constraints. Reliable, secure and scalable, it handles payments, inventory, shipping and returns. At Agency, we customise Shopify to create a store that reflects your brand, optimised for conversion and SEO.

sections.title: Custom Shopify design, built to convert
sections.body: We build custom Shopify themes that reflect your brand identity and guide customers towards purchase. Optimised product pages, smooth checkout, persuasive product descriptions: every detail is designed to increase your conversion rate.

sections.title: Product catalogue, variants and inventory management
sections.body: Whether you have 10 or 10,000 products, we structure your catalogue for intuitive navigation. Organised collections, smart filters, variants (size, colour, material), real-time inventory and supplier sync if needed.

sections.title: Secure payment and optimal buying experience
sections.body: We configure Shopify Payments, Stripe, PayPal and other payment methods suited to your market. Optimised checkout to reduce cart abandonment, transparent order tracking and personalised transactional emails.

sections.title: E-commerce SEO and product ranking
sections.body: Well-ranked product pages generate qualified traffic at zero cost. We optimise URLs, title tags, descriptions, Product Schema structured data, customer reviews and sitemaps so your products appear on Google Shopping and in organic results.

deliverables.title: What your Shopify store includes
items: Product catalogue, variants and inventory management
Google Analytics and Facebook Pixel integration
Maintenance and support included for 3 months

cta.title: Launch your Shopify store in 6 weeks
cta.subtitle: Free quote, end-to-end support.

meta.title: Custom-built website (code) — Agency web agency
meta.description: Custom website development in Next.js, React and TypeScript. Maximum performance, native SEO, no limits. For ambitious projects.

hero.title: An unlimited website, built from scratch.
hero.subtitle: When WordPress and Shopify aren't enough, we develop custom web applications in Next.js, React and TypeScript. Absolute performance, native SEO, no constraints.

serviceSurMesure.intro: Some projects require a solution that off-the-shelf CMS platforms simply cannot offer: a SaaS platform, a complex client portal, a marketplace, a web application with specific business rules, or a site that demands performance and design impossible to achieve with a theme. That's where our custom development expertise comes in.

sections.title: Next.js, React and TypeScript: the web's most powerful stack
sections.body: We build with Next.js, the reference React framework powering sites like Vercel, Notion and Linear. Static rendering (SSG), server-side rendering (SSR), streaming: we choose the optimal rendering strategy for each page. TypeScript secures every line, Tailwind CSS ensures a coherent design system.

sections.title: Headless architecture and business integrations
sections.body: Your site can integrate with any tool: headless CMS (Sanity, Contentful, Strapi), CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce), ERP, email tools, advanced analytics, third-party APIs. We design the architecture so your platform grows with your business.

sections.title: Absolute performance and perfect Core Web Vitals
sections.body: Without CMS constraints, we achieve performance impossible with WordPress or Shopify: Lighthouse 100/100, LCP under 1 second, CLS at zero. Every byte of JavaScript, every image and every request is optimised.

sections.title: Native SEO and multilingual support
sections.body: SEO is not an option, it's a foundation. Complete Schema.org markup, dynamic sitemaps, multilingual hreflang, Open Graph and Twitter Card tags, server-side rendering for perfect Google indexing — all natively integrated.

deliverables.title: What your custom project includes
items: Headless CMS and business API integration
CI/CD deployment on Vercel or dedicated infrastructure

cta.title: Let's talk about your custom project
cta.subtitle: Free technical scoping. Estimate within 48h.

meta.title: SEO agency & Google search optimisation — Agency
meta.description: French SEO agency: audit, content strategy, technical SEO, link building and reporting. Get your website into Google's top 3 on your strategic keywords.

hero.title: Get your website into Google's top 3.
hero.subtitle: An SEO agency specialised in technical, editorial and off-site search optimisation. We turn your website into a qualified-traffic machine.

serviceSeo.intro: Google SEO is the most profitable acquisition channel on the web: it works for you 24/7, doesn't stop when you cut the ad budget, and reinforces brand credibility with every position you win.

sections.title: A complete SEO audit before any action
sections.body: Every engagement starts with an in-depth audit: technical analysis (crawl, indexing, Core Web Vitals, Schema.org markup), semantic analysis (keywords, search intent, competitors) and off-site analysis (link profile, domain authority).

sections.title: Technical SEO: invisible but decisive foundations
sections.body: Google search optimisation starts with rock-solid technical architecture. We optimise speed (Core Web Vitals), Hn structure, canonical URLs, multilingual sitemaps, hreflang and Schema.org structured data.

sections.title: Content strategy and semantics
sections.body: Google ranks pages that best answer the user's search intent. We identify high-potential keywords, map intents and build an editorial calendar aligned with your conversion funnel.

sections.title: Link building and domain authority
sections.body: Backlinks remain a major ranking factor. We grow your link profile with a quality-first approach: thematic partnerships, digital PR, guest posts on relevant media, local citations.

sections.title: Monitoring, reporting and monthly iterations
sections.body: Every month we track your rankings, organic traffic, conversions and competitor moves. You get a clear, actionable report — no jargon.

deliverables.title: What our SEO retainer includes
items: Technical, semantic and off-site SEO audit

cta.title: Let's talk about your SEO strategy
cta.subtitle: Free SEO audit, actionable recommendations within 7 days.

meta.title: Google Ads (PPC) — Agency advertising agency
meta.description: Google Ads agency: creation, optimisation and management of Google advertising campaigns. Maximised ROI, precise targeting, transparent reporting.

hero.title: Google Ads campaigns that generate clients, not just clicks.
hero.subtitle: We create and optimise your Google Ads campaigns to attract qualified prospects at the right moment. Controlled budget, measurable ROI, immediate results.

serviceAds.intro: Google Ads allows you to appear immediately at the top of search results, without waiting the 6–12 months needed for organic SEO. It's a powerful lever for generating leads quickly, testing new markets or complementing your SEO strategy — but it must be activated precisely to avoid wasting your budget.

sections.title: Precise targeting: the right keywords at the right moment
sections.body: An effective Google Ads campaign starts with rigorous keyword selection. We analyse search volumes, competition, cost-per-click and purchase intent to target only the queries likely to convert into customers.

sections.title: Compelling ads that attract clicks
sections.body: We write text ads and responsive ads that stand out: catchy headlines, benefit-driven descriptions, ad extensions (calls, sitelinks, snippets). Every ad is A/B tested to identify the best-converting copy.

sections.title: Conversion-optimised landing pages
sections.body: Good traffic to a bad page is wasted budget. We optimise or create dedicated landing pages for your campaigns: message aligned with the ad, social proof, visible contact form, clear call to action.

sections.title: Continuous optimisation and monthly reporting
sections.body: We analyse your campaign performance daily: CTR, CPC, conversion rate, cost per acquisition. We adjust bids, pause underperforming keywords and amplify what works. You get a clear monthly report with your KPIs.

deliverables.title: What your Google Ads management includes

cta.title: Launch your first Google Ads campaign
cta.subtitle: Free audit of your current campaigns. Quote within 48h.

meta.title: TikTok & Instagram social media management — Agency
meta.description: Social media agency: strategy, content creation and management of your TikTok and Instagram presence. Grow your audience and engage your community.

hero.title: A social presence that builds your brand and attracts customers.
hero.subtitle: We manage your TikTok and Instagram presence: content strategy, visual creation, publishing and performance analysis. Your brand shines, your community grows.

serviceSocial.intro: Social media has become essential for reaching your audience where they spend their time. TikTok and Instagram are today the platforms with the highest organic growth potential for brands. But an effective presence requires strategy, consistency and creative expertise.

sections.title: Content strategy tailored to your brand
sections.body: Every brand has its own voice, values and audience. We start with an audit of your current presence, an analysis of your target audience and a study of your competitors to define a coherent and distinctive editorial line on TikTok and Instagram.

sections.title: TikTok: capture attention, create virality
sections.body: TikTok is the world's fastest-growing platform. Its algorithms favour organic discovery, allowing brands of any size to reach millions of people without an advertising budget. We create short, dynamic and authentic video content.

sections.title: Instagram: build an engaged community
sections.body: Instagram remains the reference for visual branding and customer relationships. We manage your feed, Reels and Stories with aesthetic consistency and an editorial calendar designed to maximise engagement.

sections.title: Performance analysis and optimisation
sections.body: Every post is a data point. We analyse the metrics that really matter: reach, impressions, engagement rate, audience growth, profile clicks and conversions. These insights fuel continuous improvement of our editorial strategy.

deliverables.title: What your social media management includes
items: Current presence audit and editorial strategy

cta.title: Grow your social media presence
cta.subtitle: Free account audit. First month with no commitment.

meta.title: About — Agency, web design & SEO agency in Paris
meta.description: Agency is an independent web agency based in Paris. Specialised in website creation and Google SEO, we serve ambitious brands.

hero.title: The web agency that refuses half-measures.
hero.subtitle: Founded in 2018 in Paris, Agency partners with companies that want the web to become a real growth lever.

sections.title: An independent, committed web agency
sections.body: Agency was born from a simple belief: it is possible to deliver elegant, high-performing and perfectly optimised websites without compromise. Independent, we choose our clients the way we choose our tools: with high standards.

sections.title: A multi-disciplinary team
sections.body: Designers, front-end and back-end developers, SEO experts, web copywriters: our team covers every skill set required to deliver an ambitious digital project.

sections.title: Values that drive every project
sections.body: We believe in transparency (timeline, budget, reporting), in technical excellence (Lighthouse 100, Core Web Vitals in the green), in pedagogy and in the long term (our clients stay with us for an average of 4 years).

sections.title: Paris, the French-speaking world and beyond
sections.body: Based in Paris, we partner with clients across the French-speaking world, in Spain and in Canada. Multilingual mastery lets us build websites that perform on several markets at once.

items.title: Total transparency
items.body: Timeline, budget, source code, analytics: it all belongs to you and is shared with you.

items.title: Technical excellence
items.body: Lighthouse 100, Core Web Vitals in the green, strict TypeScript. No compromise.

items.title: Real collaboration
items.body: A dedicated point of contact, clear rituals, real availability. No endless email chains.

items.title: Measurable impact
items.body: We track the indicators that matter to you: qualified traffic, conversions, revenue.

sections.title: Publisher

sections.title: Hosting

sections.title: Intellectual property

sections.title: Liability

sections.title: Contact

meta.title: Privacy policy — Agency
meta.description: Privacy policy of Agency: personal data processing, cookies, GDPR rights.

sections.title: Data controller
sections.body: The controller of personal data collected on this website is Agency SAS, 12 rue de la République, 75001 Paris. For any request relating to your personal data, please write to contact@agency.example.com.

sections.title: Data collected
sections.body: We only collect the data needed to handle your request via the contact form: name, business email, company (optional), subject and message.

sections.title: Purposes and legal basis
sections.body: Data is processed to answer your request and establish a commercial relationship. The legal basis is your explicit consent and the performance of pre-contractual measures.

sections.title: Retention period
sections.body: Your data is kept for 3 years from the last contact. Beyond this period, it is deleted or anonymised.

sections.title: Your rights
sections.body: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection and portability. Write to contact@agency.example.com to exercise your rights.

sections.title: Cookies
sections.body: This website uses no advertising cookies and no third-party tracking. Only necessary technical cookies may be used, with no personal identification.
